mapper.select: SELECT * FROM checixianlu ORDER BY addtime DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checixianlu (xianlumingcheng, luxiantupian, xianlufenlei, shifazhandian, zhongdianzhandian, tujingzhandian, checi, huanchengxinxi, yunxingshijian, luxianxiangqing, gengxinshijian, feiyongshuoming, huanchengfangan, clicknum) VALUES (#{xianlumingcheng}, #{luxiantupian}, #{xianlufenlei}, #{shifazhandian}, #{zhongdianzhandian}, #{tujingzhandian}, #{checi}, #{huanchengxinxi}, #{yunxingshijian}, #{luxianxiangqing}, #{gengxinshijian}, #{feiyongshuoming}, #{huanchengfangan}, #{clicknum})
mapper.update: UPDATE checixianlu SET xianlumingcheng = #{xianlumingcheng}, luxiantupian = #{luxiantupian}, xianlufenlei = #{xianlufenlei}, shifazhandian = #{shifazhandian}, zhongdianzhandian = #{zhongdianzhandian}, tujingzhandian = #{tujingzhandian}, checi = #{checi}, huanchengxinxi = #{huanchengxinxi}, yunxingshijian = #{yunxingshijian}, luxianxiangqing = #{luxianxiangqing}, gengxinshijian = #{gengxinshijian}, feiyongshuoming = #{feiyongshuoming}, huanchengfangan = #{huanchengfangan}, clicknum = #{clicknum} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM checixianlu ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
